DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_table; CREATE TABLE test_table(a Float64, b Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (NULL, NULL), (2.5, 3.5), (4.5, 5.5);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS empty_table; CREATE TABLE empty_table(a Float64, b Float64) ENGINE = Memory;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sample_table; CREATE TABLE sample_table(i UInt32, x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO sample_table VALUES (1, 1.0, 2.0), (2, 2.0, 4.0), (3, 3.0, 6.0), (4, 4.0, 8.0);
SELECT covarSamp(x, y) FROM (SELECT x, y FROM sample_table WHERE i <= 2);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS complex_table1; CREATE TABLE complex_table1(x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO complex_table1 VALUES (5.0, 10.0), (15.0, 20.0);
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS complex_table2; CREATE TABLE complex_table2(a Float64, b Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO complex_table2 VALUES (6.0, 12.0), (18.0, 24.0);
SELECT covarSamp(c.x, d.y) FROM complex_table1 AS c JOIN complex_table2 AS d ON c.x > 0 AND d.a > 0;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nested_query_table; CREATE TABLE nested_query_table(x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO nested_query_table VALUES (1.5, 2.5), (2.5, 3.5), (3.5, 4.5);
SELECT covarSamp(x, y) FROM (SELECT x, y FROM nested_query_table WHERE x < 3.0) AS subquery;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS large_data_table; CREATE TABLE large_data_table(x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO large_data_table SELECT number * 0.1, number * 0.2 FROM numbers(1000);
SELECT covarSamp(x, y) FROM large_data_table WHERE x < 50 AND y > 10;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS aggregation_table; CREATE TABLE aggregation_table(id UInt32, val1 Float64, val2 Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO aggregation_table VALUES (1, 10.0, 20.0), (2, 20.0, 30.0), (3, 30.0, 40.0), (4, 40.0, 50.0);
SELECT covarSamp(val1, val2) AS sample_covariance, COUNT(*) AS total_records FROM aggregation_table GROUP BY total_records HAVING total_records > 1;
